title: The Renter
text: small apartment, limited permanent changes allowed; wants reversible, damage-free, landlord-safe ideas; pain point: my rental does not allow paint or holes

title: The Vintage Hunter
text: loves thrifting and antiquing; wants sourcing strategy, quality and authenticity checks, and mixing old and new; pain point: thrifting overwhelms me

title: The Organizer
text: obsessive about tidy functional spaces; loves checklists, systems, labeled zones; pain point: I have no storage in my tiny kitchen

title: The Holiday Maximalist
text: goes big on fall and Christmas; wants moody nostalgic classic decor and tablescapes; pain point: wants impact without it looking cheap

title: The New Homeowner
text: modest budget, dated or builder-basic house; wants high-impact projects that add character; pain point: how do I make this feel like mine without a renovation
